name: node-clone
title: node-clone
summary: deep cloning of objects and arrays
description:
deep cloning of objects and arrays
This module offers foolproof deep cloning of objects, arrays, numbers,
strings, etc. in JavaScript.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.

When validating lab setup, run `node-clone --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
